summary: Iteration 7 (group chats + in-chat group ETH sends + CSV/tax export + Emergent push registration) tested end-to-end. Backend: 20/21 pytest pass (test_iteration7.py). ONE confirmed bug — GET /api/chat/contacts does NOT sort alphabetically per spec; returns insertion order ['Maya Chen','Daniel Park','Vault Support'] (server.py:1043-1046, the cursor has no .sort() applied). All other backend spec items pass: POST /api/chat/groups creates a conversation with is_group=true and members[]; group appears in GET /api/chat/conversations; POST /api/chat/send_crypto on a group correctly 400s when to_contact_id is missing OR points to a non-member, then falls through to the sender ETH balance check (returns 400 'Insufficient ETH'); on a 1-on-1 the to_contact_id is ignored; auto-ack only fires for 1-on-1 (verified via code path /api/chat/send_crypto:1228); tx_card schema includes to_address/to_contact_id/to_name and the conv last_message gets a '💸 Sent X ETH to <name>' preview. GET /api/transactions/export returns text/csv with attachment Content-Disposition, the exact 14-column header [Date (UTC), Type, Category, Asset, Amount, USD Value, Cost Basis USD, Service Fee USD, Net USD, Counterparty, Network, Tx Hash, Status, Explorer URL] and obeys date_from / date_to / assets / types query filters; requires auth (401 without bearer). POST /api/register-push exists (not 404), validates body schema (422 on missing fields), returns 502 'Push provider unavailable' with the placeholder key — exactly as the spec said to expect; main API calls (chat send, send_crypto, approvals/decide) wrap send_push in try/except so a push failure is never propagated. Resend auto-poller confirmed running every 5 minutes — backend logs show GET https://api.resend.com/domains at 13:01:32 and 13:06:32 UTC. Regression suite (auth/login, wallet/assets, chat/conversations, cosigners, approvals/pending, transactions) all 200/expected shape. Frontend (Expo web, 390x844): All spec UI flows verified — Activity tab header has the 'Export' pill (data-testid present, opens the ExportSheet); Export sheet shows DATE RANGE pills (Last 30 days / This year / Last year / All time), ASSETS pills (BTC / ETH / USDC / SOL), TYPE pills (Sends / Receives / Deposits / Withdrawals), and the 'Export CSV' CTA — all interactive. Chat tab header shows BOTH new icon buttons: people icon (data-testid='open-new-group') next to the existing videocam (data-testid='open-video-call'); tapping people navigates to /chat/new-group which lists 3 seeded contacts (Maya Chen, Daniel Park, Vault Support) with gold checkmark chips when selected, a 'GROUP NAME' input, and a sticky 'Create group' CTA at bottom. Creating a group navigates to /chat/<id> with the group avatar (people-icon) + title 'TEST UI Group' + subtitle '2 members · End-to-end encrypted'. Tapping the cash icon (data-testid='chat-attach-crypto') in a group composer opens the 'Send ETH in this group' bottom sheet containing the member-picker chip row [@Maya] [@Daniel] — the active recipient is highlighted in gold (rgb(201,163,91)). Push infrastructure is web-safe — console shows a non-blocking '[expo-notifications] Listening to push token changes is not yet fully supported on web' warning but the app does NOT crash on login / navigation / wallet load. No red-screen.

minor.issue: Spec says contacts should be returned sorted alphabetically by name, but server.py:1043-1046 returns insertion order (Maya, Daniel, Vault Support). Fix: add `.sort('name', 1)` to the cursor or `sorted(items, key=lambda c: c['name'].lower())` before returning.

Backend module-level instantiates a long-lived httpx.AsyncClient at import time with the placeholder key baked into headers (server.py:1685-1689). Works but means the key is captured at startup — if EMERGENT_PUSH_KEY rotates without a restart, register/send will keep using the old key.
Carry-over: server.py is now ~1741 lines — well past the 700-line guideline. Recommend routers/.
Carry-over: 28-byte JWT_SECRET (InsecureKeyLengthWarning); bcrypt __about__ deprecation warning. Pin bcrypt==4.0.1, set 32+ byte JWT_SECRET.

integration_issues.issue: Because /chat/contacts isn't sorted, the new-group screen lists contacts in seed order (Maya, Daniel, Vault Support) rather than alphabetically — purely a UX nit that vanishes once the backend sort is added.

react_native_issues.issue: Web console warning: '[expo-notifications] Listening to push token changes is not yet fully supported on web. Adding a listener will have no effect.' Confirms push is a no-op on web preview per spec. Non-blocking — no fix required, but worth gating the addNotificationReceivedListener registration behind `Platform.OS !== 'web'` in /app/frontend/src/lib/push.ts to silence the warning.
Carry-over warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Same as iter6 — appears in BiometricGate.tsx:75.
Multiple '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' warnings — site-wide. Migrate shadowColor/shadowOffset/shadowOpacity/shadowRadius to the new `boxShadow` prop.
Carry-over: expo@54.0.34 (expected ~54.0.35), expo-font@14.0.11 (~14.0.12), expo-router@6.0.23 (~6.0.24). Run `npx expo install --check`.

action_items: Fix /api/chat/contacts in server.py:1043-1046 to return contacts sorted alphabetically by `name` (case-insensitive). Either `cur.sort('name', 1)` Mongo-side or `sorted(items, key=lambda c: (c.get('name') or '').lower())` in Python.
(Optional) Gate Notifications.addPushTokenListener / addNotificationReceivedListener behind `Platform.OS !== 'web'` in /app/frontend/src/lib/push.ts to suppress the expo-notifications web warning.
(Carry-over) Migrate site-wide `shadowColor/Offset/Opacity/Radius` props to the new `boxShadow` style; migrate `props.pointerEvents` to `style.pointerEvents`.
(Carry-over) Set 32+ byte JWT_SECRET; pin bcrypt==4.0.1; run `npx expo install --check`; consider splitting server.py into routers/.
critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/chat/send_crypto correctly orders its validation: 1) amount cap check (< MULTISIG_THRESHOLD_ETH), 2) conv lookup, 3) is_group branching with to_contact_id presence + membership check, 4) sender pk/addr presence, 5) finally the on-chain balance via _broadcast_eth_send. The 'balance check fires last' invariant from the spec is satisfied (server.py:1159-1189). Auto-ack is correctly gated by `if not is_group:` (line 1229).

tx_card persistence (server.py:1203-1221) writes ALL of the required fields — kind, tx_hash, explorer_url, amount_eth, asset, to_address, to_contact_id, to_name, tx_status — and conv.last_message gets a human-readable '💸 Sent X ETH to <name>' preview suitable for the chat list.

CSV export (server.py:966-1039) is solid: StreamingResponse with text/csv + attachment Content-Disposition; date_to is treated inclusively (date_to + T23:59:59.999Z); Net USD column correctly negates send/withdraw fiat and subtracts the service fee; filename embeds the date range. Uses Mongo $in for assets/types so filters compose. Headers exactly match the spec.

Push integration is fail-open everywhere — every call site (chat message send, chat crypto send, approval approved/rejected) wraps send_push in try/except and logger.warning, and send_push itself catches all exceptions internally (server.py:1718-1740). Even with a placeholder EMERGENT_PUSH_KEY → 401/502 upstream, the primary API calls succeed.

Group creation (server.py:1264-1306) validates that ALL contact_ids belong to the calling user (line 1271) — prevents adding strangers to your group. Stores normalized member objects {contact_id, name, avatar} on the conversation so the client doesn't need a follow-up /chat/contacts fetch to render member chips.

Frontend ExportSheet.tsx + activity.tsx header pill render the correct three-section UI (Date / Assets / Type) and properly compose the GET /transactions/export query string. The pills are toggleable not exclusive, matching the backend's $in semantics.
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_iteration7.py (new — 21 tests covering contacts sort, group CRUD, in-chat send_crypto group/1-on-1 semantics, CSV export headers + filters + auth, push registration route existence + serialization, and regression on login/wallet/conversations/cosigners/approvals/transactions)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all spec UI flows verified: Activity export pill + sheet pills + CSV CTA, Chat tab people icon, new-group screen with checkmark contact rows + group name input + Create CTA, group thread with people avatar + 'N members' subtitle, group composer cash icon → bottom sheet → member-picker chip row with gold highlight)

seed_data_creation: Per-module fresh user `it7_<uuid>@vaulted.app` registered for the backend test class (uses the standard register-time seed: 4 balances, 3 contacts, 1 welcome USDC tx). Frontend testing used the pre-seeded smoketest@vaulted.app / test1234 account and created a TEST UI group + 'Stablecoin Stackers' group via the UI; both are visible in the chat list afterwards.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter7 adds three features: (1) Group chats via POST /api/chat/groups + extended conversation schema (is_group, group_name, members[]); (2) CSV tax export via GET /api/transactions/export with date/asset/type filters; (3) Emergent push registration via POST /api/register-push (placeholder key → upstream 401→502 expected). The one outstanding backend bug is alphabetical sort missing on /api/chat/contacts. Push is a no-op on web preview (expo-notifications limitation); to exercise real push delivery you'd need an Expo Dev Client build + a non-placeholder EMERGENT_PUSH_KEY. The Resend auto-poller still fires every 5 min and DNS for phoenix-atlas.com is verified — RESEND_FROM may be auto-promoted to the verified domain mid-iteration; tests should NOT pin Resend status. ExportSheet testIDs: 'export-pill' (header trigger), 'export-csv-btn' (submit). Chat new-group testIDs: 'open-new-group' (header), 'pick-contact-<id>' (rows), 'group-name-input', 'create-group-btn'. Crypto-in-group sheet testIDs: 'chat-attach-crypto' (composer cash icon), 'chat-crypto-sheet', 'pick-member-<contact_id>', 'chat-crypto-amount', 'chat-crypto-confirm', 'chat-crypto-cancel'. Login submit testID is 'login-submit-button' (NOT 'login-submit').
rca_of_issue: Single backend bug — /api/chat/contacts at server.py:1043-1046 returns `await db.contacts.find({'user_id': user['id']}, {'_id': 0}).to_list(200)` with no sort. Reproduction: register a fresh user and GET /api/chat/contacts — observe order ['Maya Chen','Daniel Park','Vault Support'] (the insertion order from SEED_CONTACTS at server.py:230-237). Expected alphabetical: ['Daniel Park','Maya Chen','Vault Support']. Mitigation: add `.sort('name', 1)` to the find() cursor (one-line fix). No data migration needed.
